header_industrySolutions.description: A top-level button in the page header navigation. Clicking this will display a list of other links to click.

header_whyWebar.description: A link under the "Industry Solutions" menu.

header_retail.description: A link under the "Industry Solutions" menu.

header_cpg.description: A link under the "Industry Solutions" menu. This stands for "Consumer Packaged Goods"

header_fashion.description: A link under the "Industry Solutions" menu.

header_automotive.description: A link under the "Industry Solutions" menu.

header_entertainment.description: A link under the "Industry Solutions" menu.

header_qsr.description: A link under the "Industry Solutions" menu. This stands for "Quick Service Restaurant"

header_verticals.description: A link under the "Industry Solutions" menu. "Verticals" in this context refers to "vertical markets", or a group of companies focused on a specific niche.

header_community.description: A top-level button in the page header navigation. Clicking this will display a list of other links to click.

header_product.description: A top-level link in the page header navigation. Clicking will redirect to a page describing 8th Wall's offerings.

header_discover.description: A top-level link in the page header navigation. Clicking will redirect to page showcasing projects build using 8th Wall

header_findPartner.description: A top-level link in the page header navigation.

header_learn.description: A top-level button in the page header navigation. Clicking will display a menu with other links to click.

header_projectLibrary.description: A link under the "Learn" menu. Clicking will redirect to a page showcasing projects built by 8th Wall.

header_blog.description: A link under the "Learn" menu. Clicking will redirect to 8th Wall's blog

header_support.description: A link under the "Learn" menu. Clicking will redirect to a resources page.

header_documentation.description: A link under the "Learn" menu. Clicking will redirect to 8th Wall's documentation page.

header_tutorials.description: A link under the "Learn" menu. Clicking will redirect to a page with tutorials on how to use 8th Wall.

header_pricing.description: A top-level link in the page header navigation. Clicking will redirect to 8th Wall's pricing page.

header_startTrial.description: A top-level link in the page headernavigation. Clicking will redirect the user to 8th Wall's signup page.

header_login.description: A top-level link in the page headernavigation. Clicking will redirect the user to 8th Wall's login page.

header_workspaces.description: A link that appears only when a user is logged in. Clicking will redirect to a page listing the user's workspaces.

header_profile.description: A link that appears only when a user is logged in. Clicking will redirect to the user's profile settings page

header_signOut.description: A link that appears only when a user is logged in. Clicking will sign the user out.
